summary: Refactored the monthly_report and yearly_report functions to use a new helper function _safe_average for calculating averages. Replaced manual summation loops with built-in sum() and simplified average calculation logic.
suggested_tests: Verify that monthly_report returns correct total and average when given valid records
Check behavior when records is an empty list (average should be 0)
Ensure yearly_report works similarly to monthly_report with the new implementation
